title: Biotin-Labelling of Immunoprecipitated RNA
author: Steven Blue
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7z4hp8w

steps.title: In an RNase-free 1
steps.instruction: In an RNase-free 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube, mix the following mix, volumes per sample: %s %s

steps.title: Magnetically separate each IP sample, remove...
steps.instruction: Magnetically separate each IP sample, remove Wash Buffer, and resuspend the beads in 26 μL of master mix.

steps.title: Incubate samples at 16°C with gentle...
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 16°C with gentle shaking for 2 hrs or overnight (recommended).

steps.title: Add 500 μL cold High Salt...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL cold High Salt Wash Buffer, mix, magnetically separate, and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Wash 3X with 500 μL cold Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Wash 3X with 500 μL cold Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend in 20 μL Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 20 μL Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Add 10
steps.instruction: Add 10.5 μL of denaturing mix for SDS-PAGE (7.5 μL 4X LDS buffer, 3 μL 1M DTT)

steps.title: Incubate at 70°C, mixing at 1200 rpm for 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 70°C, mixing at 1200 rpm for 10 min.

steps.title: Place tubes on ice for > 1 min
steps.instruction: Place tubes on ice for > 1 min.

steps.title: Magnetically separate samples and load 15...
steps.instruction: Magnetically separate samples and load 15 μL on gel, reserving the other half at -20°C as backup.

steps.title: Run the gel at 150V for 75 min
steps.instruction: Run the gel at 150V for 75 min.

steps.title: Transfer to nitrocellulose membrane at 30V overnight
steps.instruction: Transfer to nitrocellulose membrane at 30V overnight.

steps.title: Develop membrane as follows using the...
steps.instruction: Develop membrane as follows using the Chemiluminescent Nucleic Acid Detection Module kit (cat. no. 89880)

steps.title: Slowly warm the Blocking Buffer and...
steps.instruction: Slowly warm the Blocking Buffer and the 4X Wash Buffer to 37-50°C in a water bath until all particulates are dissolved.

steps.title: Block membrane by adding 10 mL...
steps.instruction: Block membrane by adding 10 mL Blocking Buffer and incubate for 15 min with gentle shaking at room temperature (all further steps done at room temperature).

steps.title: Prepare conjugate/blocking buffer solution by adding 31
steps.instruction: Prepare conjugate/blocking buffer solution by adding 31.25 μL of the Stabilized Streptavidin-Horseradish Peroxidase Conjugate to 10mL Blocking Buffer.

steps.title: Decant blocking buffer from the membrane...
steps.instruction: Decant blocking buffer from the membrane and add 10 mL to the conjugate/blocking solution. Incubate membrane in the conjugate/blocking buffer solution for 15 min with gentle shaking.

steps.title: Prepare 1X wash solution by adding...
steps.instruction: Prepare 1X wash solution by adding 40 mL of 4X Wash Buffer to 120 mL water.

steps.title: Transfer membrane to a new container...
steps.instruction: Transfer membrane to a new container and rinse briefly with 20 mL of 1X wash solution.

steps.title: Wash membrane four times for 5...
steps.instruction: Wash membrane four times for 5 min each in 20 mL of 1X wash solution with gentle shaking.

steps.title: Transfer membrane to a new container...
steps.instruction: Transfer membrane to a new container and add 30 mL of Substrate Equilibration Buffer. Incubate membrane for 5 min with gentle shaking.

steps.title: Prepare Chemiluminescent Substrate Working Solution by...
steps.instruction: Prepare Chemiluminescent Substrate Working Solution by adding 2 mL Luminol/Enhancer Solution to 6 mL Stable Peroxide Solution. Note: Working solution is susceptible damage via prolonged light exposure. Keep solution in an amber bottle or keep away from light.

steps.title: Remove membrane from the Substrate Equilibration...
steps.instruction: Remove membrane from the Substrate Equilibration Buffer and remove excess buffer. Place membrane in a clean container or clean sheet of plastic wrap.

steps.title: Pour the Substrate Working Solution onto...
steps.instruction: Pour the Substrate Working Solution onto the membrane so that it completely covers the surface. Incubate membrane in the substrate solution for 5 min without shaking.

steps.title: Remove membrane from the Working Solution and remove excess buffer
steps.instruction: Remove membrane from the Working Solution and remove excess buffer. Do not allow the membrane to dry out.

steps.title: Wrap the membrane in plastic wrap,...
steps.instruction: Wrap the membrane in plastic wrap, avoiding bubbles, and place in a film cassette. Obtain optimal signal by adjusting film exposure time or by exposing membrane to multiple films simultaneously.

steps.title: Add 500 μL cold High Salt...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL cold High Salt Wash Buffer, move on magnet, add 500 μL cold Wash Buffer, magnetically separate, remove supernatant.

steps.title: Lyse cells in cold eCLIP lysis...
steps.instruction: Lyse cells in cold eCLIP lysis buffer containing 1X protease inhibitor. 5.5 μL protease inhibitor cocktail III per 1 mL Lysis Buffer. Lyse pellets at similar ratio to that used in CLIP experiments (200 μL Lysis Buffer per 4M cells) A typical experiment includes 2 (4 million cell) crosslinked samples and 1 (4 million cell) non-crosslinked sample

steps.title: Lyse on ice for 15 min
steps.instruction: Lyse on ice for 15 min.

steps.title: Sonicate on Low setting for 5...
steps.instruction: Sonicate on Low setting for 5 min, 30 sec on/30 sec off.

steps.title: Make 2 dilutions of RNase I in PBS
steps.instruction: Make 2 dilutions of RNase I in PBS: 1:25 (4 U/μL) 1:3 (33.3 U/μL)

steps.title: Add diluted RNase to lysate
steps.instruction: Add diluted RNase to lysate: 2 μL of 1:25 dilution to the 1st crosslinked lysate = Crosslink Standard RNase 2 μL of 1:3 dilution to the 2nd crosslinked lysate = Crosslink High RNase 2 μL of 1:25 dilution to the non-crosslinked lysate = Non-crosslinked Standard RNase

steps.title: Add 1 μL Turbo DNase to each 4M cell lysate
steps.instruction: Add 1 μL Turbo DNase to each 4M cell lysate.

steps.title: Immediately incubate lysates in a Thermomixer...
steps.instruction: Immediately incubate lysates in a Thermomixer set to 37°C, shaking at 1200 rpm, for 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g for 10 min at 4°C. Transfer cleared lysate to washed beads.

steps.title: For each 4M cell lysate, aliquot...
steps.instruction: For each 4M cell lysate, aliquot 25 μL of species-specific Dynabeads (e.g. ThermoFisher catalog # 11203D, 11202D, or equivalent)

steps.title: Wash the beads twice in 500 μL cold Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Wash the beads twice in 500 μL cold Lysis Buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 μL of Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 μL of Lysis Buffer.

steps.title: Add 2 μg of RBP-specific antibody to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 2 μg of RBP-specific antibody to each tube.

steps.title: Rotate at room temperature for 45 min
steps.instruction: Rotate at room temperature for 45 min. Proceed to step 7 (Cell Lysis) while rotating.

steps.title: Wash twice with 500 μL cold...
steps.instruction: Wash twice with 500 μL cold Lysis Buffer and reserve on ice until step 14.

steps.title: Rotate at 4°C overnight
steps.instruction: Rotate at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: For each sample, wash twice with...
steps.instruction: For each sample, wash twice with 500 μL cold High Salt Wash Buffer.

steps.title: To each sample, add 500 μL...
steps.instruction: To each sample, add 500 μL cold High Salt Wash Buffer, mix, add 500 μL cold Wash Buffer.

steps.title: For each sample, wash 3X with...
steps.instruction: For each sample, wash 3X with cold Wash Buffer, keep on ice after last wash.

steps.title: Briefly spin tubes and remove residual wash buffer
steps.instruction: Briefly spin tubes and remove residual wash buffer. Resuspend the beads in the following mix, volumes per sample: %s %s

steps.title: Incubate the FastAP reaction in a...
steps.instruction: Incubate the FastAP reaction in a Thermomixer at 37°C, mixing at 1200 rpm, for 10 min.

steps.title: While incubating the FastAP reaction, prepare...
steps.instruction: While incubating the FastAP reaction, prepare the following mix, volumes per sample: %s %s

steps.title: Without removing the FastAP mix, add...
steps.instruction: Without removing the FastAP mix, add 150 μL of the PNK mix to each sample and place back on Thermomixer, incubating at 37°C, 1200 rpm, for 20 min.

steps.title: To each sample, add 200 μL...
steps.instruction: To each sample, add 200 μL High Salt Wash Buffer, mix, separate on magnet, and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Add 500 μL High Salt Wash...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL High Salt Wash Buffer, mix, then add 500 μL Wash Buffer. Remove supernatant.

steps.title: Wash 3X with 500 μL Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Wash 3X with 500 μL Wash Buffer.
